Auth: only the Pool itself (msg.sender == pool address) can update its      mandate. The Pool's stewards exercise this via `pool:update_mandate`      MCP tool which redeems a STEWARDSHIP_DELEGATION \u27f6 pool.execute \u27f6      MandateRegistry.setMandate.      Mirror class assertion: `sa:PoolMandateUpdatedAssertion` (emitted      separately by the action layer; this contract's events feed the      on-chain \u2192 GraphDB sync as a coarse fallback).","kind":"dev","methods":{"setMandate(address,bytes32,bytes32)":{"params":{"geoRoot_":"New Merkle root over allowed geo IRI hashes.","kindsRoot_":"New Merkle root over allowed kind IRI hashes.","pool":"Pool address (the pool's AgentAccount)."}}},"title":"MandateRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"setMandate(address,bytes32,bytes32)":{"notice":"Replace a pool's mandate roots. Restricted to the pool itself         so only a steward-redeemed delegation can mutate."}},"notice":"Per-pool mandate Merkle roots \u2014 the public source of truth for         which kinds / geographies a Pool's stewards may direct funds to.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/MandateRegistry.sol":"MandateRegistry"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":account-abstraction/=lib/account-abstraction/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/MandateRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb68d7ea37890525ed0f9260fcfa7e40c0bf6309d94fc89f42ca7a578ad4040ef","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://74a08e2558b07f1f291972f5e2dc879bd44162dfe3ca2342d23d0cde6631697d","dweb:/ipfs/QmTryomKWyqVEZJZ9H86SX7f4ruY1hkFk9B6CD81qFczwR"]}},"version":1}

params.geoRoot_: New Merkle root over allowed geo IRI hashes.
params.kindsRoot_: New Merkle root over allowed kind IRI hashes.

setMandate(address,bytes32,bytes32).notice: Replace a pool's mandate roots. Restricted to the pool itself         so only a steward-redeemed delegation can mutate.
